description_long: A well-dressed adult male figure is depicted in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt, tie, and matching vest. The suit is tailored and fitted, with lapels, buttons, and a belt visible at the waist. The figure has a neatly groomed hairstyle, with short hair styled back, and a full beard and mustache. His posture is upright, with arms slightly outstretched to the sides. He is wearing formal dress shoes, and his facial features are defined and realistic. In front of him, a long, double-edged sword with a crossguard and pommel is positioned upright, suggesting a juxtaposition of modern and historical elements.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit stands upright with a sword positioned in front of him, combining modern attire with a medieval weapon.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's suit details, facial features, and the sword standing upright in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the sword's thin profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit, hairstyle, and the man's posture from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, arm position, and the sword's edge-on appearance.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt, tie, and vest
attribute_hairstyle: short, styled back hair with full beard and mustache
